en: this situation need right now?
You know, do I need to drop back
and replace Jan Moss on defense?
Or, you know, should I attack like Jamie?
Or, you know, do I lend Roy here a piece of gum
because his breath smells like dookie?
You know what I mean?
Complete hypothetical, don't worry, you're fine, you're fine.
ko: 완전 가상의 상황이야, 걱정하지 마, 괜찮아.

en: All right, you gotta be able to jump in anywhere
ko: 어디서든 언제든지 뛰어들 수 있어야 해,

en: at any time, and the way to do that well
is to understand and appreciate everyone's position
and every position's function.
ko: 각 위치의 기능을 이해하고 존중해야 해.

en: That's why we got our man Beard replacing Will today as our kit man.
ko: 그래서 오늘 우리 키트 매니저로 윌을 대신해 비어드를 데려왔어.

en: Yeah, so when we get out here and we scrimmage,
y'all are gonna be swapping positions with someone else.
ko: 너희는 다른 사람과 포지션을 바꿀 거야.

en: Yeah, for example, you know, Isaac,
we're gonna move you up to forward,
and Danny, we're gonna drop you back to defense, got it?
I'm gonna be Danny Rojas.
That's right, Isaac, and Danny is gonna be you, make sense?
ko: 맞아, 아이작, 다니는 너가 될 거야, 이해했지?

en: We're gonna fucking rock this!
Ay, Dios mios.
No, y'all don't need to do the voices. Oh!
ko: 아니, 너희는 목소리 흉내 낼 필요 없어. 오!

en: Okay, all right, y'all can do the voices.
ko: 좋아, 알겠어, 목소리 흉내 내도 돼.

en: Yeah, yeah, yeah.
Go ahead, Roy, help him out here.
Roy's now gonna be handing out a piece of paper that's got someone's name on it.
ko: 로이가 이제 누군가의 이름이 적힌 종이를 나눠줄 거야.

en: That's the name of the person.
